title: A Pilgrim's Shelter

sections.label: Intro
lines: Whispers in the valley, a cry in the night,
The hills hold their silence, but I seek the light.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In my distress, I called upon the heights,
The heavens heard, casting down the lies.
Sharp as arrows, words once pierced my soul,
But a voice of truth, now makes me whole.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, where does my refuge lie?
Beneath the vast and open sky.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: From the shadows, I am freed,
Guided by the stars’ decree.
Through the storm, a beacon shines,
A distant cry becomes divine.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Woe to the wanderer in the land of deceit,
Yet steps of faith make the journey complete.
Though the fire burns and arrows still fall,
A higher voice whispers, "I am your all."

sections.label: Bridge
lines: O mountains, rise and echo my plea,
O valleys, carry my yearning to the sea.
Let the winds cry mercy, let the storms abate,
For in this journey, I find my fate.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: From the shadows, I am freed,
Guided by the stars’ decree.
Through the storm, a beacon shines,
A distant cry becomes divine.

sections.label: Outro
lines: And so I stand, though the world may weep,
In the arms of solace, my soul finds peace.

epigraph: In my distress I cried unto the LORD
